prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The report discusses the NHS Pension Scheme, which is relevant to Scotland as the National Health Service in Scotland operates its own version of the NHS Pension Scheme distinct from those in England, Wales, and Northern Ireland. Therefore, the information applies to Scotland.
